outline.text: 1.2. Get started with Cortex Cloud APIs
1.3. Get your Cortex API key ID
2.1.3.1. Get all or filtered asset groups
2.1.4.3. Get raw fields of asset by ID
2.1.4.5. Get enum values of specified field
2.1.7.1. Create authentication settings for IdP SSO or metadata URL
2.1.7.4. Get authentication settings for all configured domains
2.1.9.3. Retrieve Case Artifacts by Case Id
2.1.11.1. Get the latest version of the Cortex CLI
2.1.17.1. Add or update data in a lookup dataset
2.1.17.2. Remove data from a lookup dataset
2.1.17.3. Get data from a lookup dataset
2.1.25.2. Get all or filtered syslog servers
2.1.25.4. Delete all or filtered syslog integrations
2.3. Cortex Cloud Alert Notification Rules REST APIs
2.3.2.3. Retrieve a specific alert notification rule
2.3.2.4. Delete an existing Alert Notification Rule
2.3.2.5. Edit an existing Alert Notification Rule
2.3.2.6. Edit the status of an existing Alert Notification Rule
2.4. ASPM, CICD and Application Security APIs
2.4.3.1.1.1. How to access Application Security policies in the UI:
2.4.3.1.1.2.1. Trigger and Action Constraints by Finding Type
2.4.3.2.1. List all or filtered Application Security policies.
2.4.3.2.1.1. How to access Application Security policies in the UI:
2.4.3.3.1. Get the details of the Application Security policy specified by its policy ID.
2.4.3.3.1.1. How to access Application Security policies in the UI:
2.4.3.4.1. Delete an Application Security policy by specifying its policy ID.
2.4.3.4.1.1. How to access Application Security policies in the UI:
2.4.3.5.1. Update the details of the Application Security policy specified by its policy ID.
2.4.3.5.1.1. How to access Application Security policies in the UI:
2.4.7.1. Get unscanned AppSec scan management repositories
2.4.8.1. Get an SBOM for the specified repository
2.4.8.2. Get all SBOMs for the specified organization
2.6.2.1. Create a cloud onboarding integration template
2.6.2.3. Get all or filtered integration instances
2.6.2.5. Enable or disable cloud integration instances
2.6.2.7. Get identifier roles for integration instance
2.6.3.1. Get accounts in the specified integration instances
2.6.5.1. Get available regions for a CSP
2.8.5.1. Add compliance rules to a compliance control
2.10.2.3. Get a CWP Policy by ID (v2)
2.10.2.4. Update a CWP Policy by ID (v2)
2.10.2.7. Get a CWP Policy by ID (v1)
2.10.2.8. Delete a CWP Policy by ID (v1)
2.10.2.9. Update a CWP Policy by ID (v1)
2.10.3.1. Get the SBOM of the specified asset

2.11.2.2. Add Disable Injection and Prevention rule
